text:
AFP - Agence France Presse



China's Pan Zhanle enjoyed a "magic moment" after smashing his own world record on his way to victory in the men's 100m freestyle at the Paris Olympics on Wednesday.

The Barron's news department was not involved in the creation of the content above. This article was produced by AFP. For more information go toAFP.com.© Agence France-Presse
title: China's Pan Wins 'Magic' 100m Freestyle Gold In New World Record- Barron's
author: AFP - Agence France Presse
description: China's Pan Zhanle enjoyed a "magic moment" after smashing his own world record on his way to victory in the men's 100m freestyle at the Paris Olympics on Wednesday.
